title: Bubble Sort
subtitle: Kabarcik siralama algoritmasi.
code:
def bubble_sort(arr)
  n = arr.length
  (0...n - 1).each do |i|
    (0...n - i - 1).each do |j|
      if arr[j] > arr[j + 1]
        arr[j], arr[j + 1] = arr[j + 1], arr[j]
      end
    end
  end
  arr
end

numbers = [64, 34, 25, 12, 22, 11, 90]
puts "Siralanmamis dizi: #{numbers}"

sorted_numbers = bubble_sort(numbers.dup)
puts "Siralanmis dizi: #{sorted_numbers}"

# Adim adim siralama
puts "\nAdim adim siralama:"
arr2 = [5, 2, 9, 1, 5]
n = arr2.length
(0...n - 1).each do |i|
  (0...n - i - 1).each do |j|
    if arr2[j] > arr2[j + 1]
      arr2[j], arr2[j + 1] = arr2[j + 1], arr2[j]
    end
  end
  puts "Adim #{i + 1}: #{arr2}"
end

# Ruby'nin kendi sort metodu
puts "\nRuby'nin sort metodu:"
data = [3, 1, 4, 1, 5, 9, 2, 6]
puts "Orijinal: #{data}"
puts "Siralanmis: #{data.sort}"
puts "Ters siralanmis: #{data.sort.reverse}"
